thag7.1:1.3: her feet stained red with lac,
thag7.1:2.2: her hands raised before me, palm-to-palm over her heart—
thag7.1:2.4: in measured words spoke to me first:
thag7.1:3.6: I will tend to you as to a fire.
thag7.1:4.3: then we will both become recluses,
thag7.1:4.4: winning the benefits of both worlds.”
thag7.1:5.4: like a snare of death laid out,
thag7.1:6.4: disenchantment stood at an even keel:
thag7.1:7.1: With that, my heart was released.
thag7.1:7.3: The three knowledges have been attained;
